summary: All 7 P1 Go-Live polish items tested and verified. Fixed missing /terms and /privacy routes in App.js. All features working correctly: Terms page (11 sections), Privacy page (10 sections), Footer links, ErrorBoundary wrapper, OG/Twitter meta tags, manifest.json, robots.txt, Cookie consent banner with Accept/Reject localStorage persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added missing routes for /terms and /privacy in App.js (lines 133-135)
TermsOfService.jsx: 11 sections with proper data-testid attributes
PrivacyPolicy.jsx: 10 sections with proper data-testid attributes
ErrorBoundary.jsx: Class component wrapping entire App, shows error UI with refresh button
CookieConsent.jsx: Uses localStorage key 'alphaai_cookie_consent' with 'accepted'/'rejected' values
manifest.json: name='Alpha AI', theme_color='#7c5cfc' as required
robots.txt: Contains 'User-agent: *' and 'Allow: /' (Cloudflare adds additional rules)
index.html: All OG and Twitter meta tags present (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 P1 items verified + regression tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 tested 7 P1 Go-Live polish items. Fixed missing /terms and /privacy routes. All items verified: Terms page (data-testid='terms-page'), Privacy page (data-testid='privacy-page'), Footer links (data-testid='footer-terms-link', 'footer-privacy-link'), ErrorBoundary wrapping App, OG/Twitter meta tags in index.html, manifest.json with name='Alpha AI' and theme_color='#7c5cfc', robots.txt with Allow: /, Cookie consent banner (data-testid='cookie-consent-banner') with Accept/Reject buttons storing in localStorage key 'alphaai_cookie_consent'.

tests_executed.test: Cookie consent banner visible on first visit
Cookie Accept button sets localStorage to 'accepted'
Cookie Reject button sets localStorage to 'rejected'
Cookie banner stays hidden after reload
Terms page has 'Terms of Service' heading
Terms page has back link to home
Privacy page has back link to home
OG meta tags present (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url)
Twitter meta tags present (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image)
Regression: Login works with test credentials

mocked_apis.note: As per main agent context - Binance Testnet orders are simulated
